meta.promotionPolicy: Only promote to data/database.json when official/high-trust source rows and athlete identity are unambiguous. Ambiguous same-name rows remain candidates only.

openPullRequestsChecked.title: Add Numata completion report generator
openPullRequestsChecked.overlapAssessment: Non-overlapping report-only work. It does not change data/database.json, data/research-candidates.json, A4 layout, or v5.9.6_LOCK.

sourcesChecked.label: Exact-name high-trust search sweep
sourcesChecked.purpose: Checked HPA/JPA/IPF/Goodlift/APF-AAPF style exact-name terms for spaced/unspaced Japanese names and romanized aliases. No additional promotable or unambiguous official rows were identified in this narrow pass.

researchCandidates.sourceLabel: HPA official annual result PDF 2024, existing PR #145 row-level extraction
researchCandidates.findingSummary: Existing official-source candidate row: 2024-11-17 第2回北海道・東北ブロックベンチプレス選手権大会, 男子M1-CL/59kg級候補, 名寄パワーリフティング協会, BP 80.0 / 85.0 / 90.0, best 90.0, place 1. Kept candidate-only because the 2026 Numata Lot 9 athlete identity and PDF class/equipment row structure require review before database promotion.
researchCandidates.separationNote: Bench-only candidate. Do not merge with three-lift PL history or equipped bench history.
